title: Sum of Two Numbers
context: A student needs a program to add two numbers together.
ask: Write pseudocode to input two integers, calculate their sum, and output the result.

title: Count Odd and Even
context:
A procedure Count() will:
1. Input a value (all values will be positive integers)
2. Count the number of odd values and the number of even values
3. Repeat from step 1 until the value input is 99
4. Output the two count values with a suitable message.
ask: Write pseudocode for the procedure Count(). The value 99 must not be counted.

title: Delete Leading Spaces
context:
A teacher is designing a program to process pseudocode projects written by her students. Each student project is stored in a text file.

The DeleteSpaces module:
- Is called with a parameter of type STRING representing a line of pseudocode
- Returns the line after removing any leading space characters

Example:
- Before: "   IF X2 > 13 THEN"
- After:  "IF X2 > 13 THEN"
ask:
Complete the pseudocode for module DeleteSpaces().
`FUNCTION DeleteSpaces(Line : STRING) RETURNS STRING`
